title: National Council for Technical Education (Grant of Autonomous Status To Arusha Technical College) Order, 2015
title_en: National Council for Technical Education (Grant of Autonomous Status To Arusha Technical College) Order, 2015

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the National Council for Technical Education (Grant of Autonomous Status To Arusha Technical Colledge) Order, 2015.

provisions.title: Grant of autonomy
provisions.content: The Arusha Technical Colledge is hereby declared to be an autonomous institution.

provisions.title: Revocation of GN No. 78 of 30th March, 2012
provisions.content: The Arusha technical Colledge (Establishment) Order, 2007 is hereby revoked History of this document 05 August 2015 this version Published in Gazette of the United Republic of Tanzania Commenced 06 July 2015 Assented to Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all. Free Access to the law supports the rule of law and access to justice. TanzLII partners with African Legal Information Institute and Laws.Africa , who provide it with technical support.
